title: Management Buyouts: A management buyout (MBO) typically involves which of the following?...
summary: Describe a management buyout as managers acquiring the company to transition it to private ownership.
prompt: A management buyout (MBO) typically involves which of the following?

options.text: An MBO involves managers acquiring the company, often transitioning it from

solution: An MBO involves managers acquiring the company, often transitioning it from public to private.
